title: Single, S-corp K-1 + W-2, CA
description: S-corp shareholder taking salary (W-2) plus K-1 distributive share. Exercises K-1 Box 1 (active ordinary income), §199A QBI on the K-1 portion, no SE tax on the K-1 (S-corp passthrough), CA state tax.
expectations: AGI = W-2 wages + K-1 Box 1 ordinary income (no SE on K-1 for S-corp)
QBI deduction applies to the K-1 portion (simplified 20%)
